User.title: User
User.description: A student user of the resource-sharing platform.

uid.description: The unique identifier of the user (matches Firebase Auth UID).

name.description: The full name of the student.

email.description: The email address of the student.

department.description: The department the student belongs to.

semester.description: The current semester of the student.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the user profile was created.

File.title: File
File.description: A study resource file uploaded by a student.

id.description: The unique identifier of the file document.

uploader_id.description: The UID of the user who uploaded the file.

uploader_name.description: The name of the user who uploaded the file.

file_name.description: The original name of the uploaded file.

file_url.description: The download URL of the file from Firebase Storage.

file_type.description: The MIME type or extension of the file.

department.description: The department this file is relevant for.

semester.description: The semester this file is relevant for.

subject.description: The subject or course this file is for.

upload_date.description: The timestamp when the file was uploaded.

/files/{fileId}.description: Stores metadata for uploaded study resources.
